name: token-optimizer
description: Cuts token consumption in coding sessions by rewriting verbose commands, compressing tool output, reminding about /compact, and routing simple tasks to cheap Haiku subagents.

maxToolOutputLines.title: Max tool output lines
maxToolOutputLines.description: Bash output longer than this many lines gets compressed before it enters context

compactReminderTurns.title: Compact reminder interval
compactReminderTurns.description: Remind to run /compact every N conversation turns

aggressiveMode.title: Aggressive mode
aggressiveMode.description: Start sessions with the strict filtering budget (equivalent to /token-optimizer:budget strict)
